values.name: discuss.call.history.view.list
values.arch:
<list string="Call History" sample="1">
                    <field name="channel_id"/>
                    <field name="start_dt"/>
                    <field name="end_dt"/>
                    <field name="duration_hour" widget="float_time" options="{'displaySeconds': True}"/>
                </list>

values.name: discuss.call.history.view.form
values.arch:
<form string="Call History">
                    <group class="oe_form_field">
                        <field name="channel_id"/>
                        <field name="start_dt"/>
                        <field name="end_dt"/>
                        <field name="duration_hour" widget="float_time" options="{'displaySeconds': True}"/>
                    </group>
                </form>
